CustomField.description: Check For Non-CGP&H Lottery Number - 2 (Not Edison MTA)
CustomField.formula:
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0J1N00001gCHdA", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Berkeley_Heights_Rental_AR__c"), "Lottery number should be Berkeley_Heights_Rental_AR__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0J3m00001icNzM", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Evergreen_Court_Wyckoff__c"), "Lottery number should be Evergreen_Court_Wyckoff__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(
Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J1N00001gCHdA",
"Good", "Good"
)))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For properties with non CGP&H lottery numbers, make sure to outreach as follows before moving to the next listing stage: 1. Non CGP&H Lottery Numbers 2. CGP&H Lottery Numbers 3. Interest Date
CustomField.label: Lottery Number Check 04
